# kSecMatchCaseInsensitive

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a Boolean indicating whether case-insensitive matching is performed.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecMatchCaseInsensitive: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFBoolean]. If this value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/kCFBooleanFalse], or if this attribute is not provided, then case-sensitive string matching is performed.
title: kSecMatchCaseInsensitive
